title: Dicer routing plan
description: Structured output from the Dicer (gemma4:e4b). The Dicer returns EITHER a routing plan (kind=plan) OR a clarifying question to the user (kind=question), never both. Validated hard; malformed output is rejected and logged.

slices.description: One or more slices the Describer will receive. Multiple slices allowed in a single plan to handle compound queries (e.g. comparing 2019 to 2024) without round-tripping the Dicer.

rationale.description: One or two sentences from the Dicer explaining why these slices answer the query. Logged for debugging; not seen by the Describer.

question.description: Single clarifying question to ask the user. Used when the query is ambiguous enough that any routing plan would be a guess.

reason.description: What about the query is ambiguous, in the Dicer's words. Logged for debugging.

label.description: Short human-readable label for this slice (e.g. '2019 baseline', 'recent year'). The Describer sees this; helps it distinguish slices in a compound query.

record_types.description: Record type names exactly as they appear in manifest.json (e.g. 'RestingHeartRate', 'VO2Max'). Empty or omitted if this slice is workouts-only. Validated against the manifest at extraction time; unknown types fail the plan.

date_range.description: Optional. If omitted, the slice covers the full history of the requested types/workouts.

aggregation_level.description: How the extractor should shape the slice. 'monthly' reads from monthly_aggregates.json (smallest, fits in any prompt). 'daily' reads from daily_aggregates.jsonl (per-day stats). 'raw' streams matching records from export.xml (largest; only when raw values are required). The Dicer should prefer the coarsest level that answers the query.

max_rows.description: Optional safety cap on extracted rows. The extractor enforces this; if exceeded, the slice is truncated and the truncation flagged to the Describer.

activity_types.description: HKWorkoutActivityType values exactly as in manifest.json workouts.by_type (e.g. 'HKWorkoutActivityTypeFencing'). Empty or omitted means all activity types.

include_routes.description: If true, the extractor includes pointers to GPX route files (by filename) for matched workouts. Phase 0 does not parse GPX content; the Describer only sees filenames.

start.description: Inclusive start date, ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). Local time as recorded by Apple Health; no timezone conversion.
